verification.notes: Internal replay slice plus the bounded editor loop are verified, including preset-based placeholder creation, snap-assisted drag/nudge, viewport alignment aids for supported placeholder-backed objects, layer reassignment, bounded placeholder width/height edits, layer-local ordering controls, read-only order-position cues, previous/next selection within the current layer, quick session-only layer isolation, duplicate/delete, undo/redo, save/reload, and deterministic replay sync; live restart and free-spins capture gaps remain.

donorEvidence.notes: Official Mystery Garden evidence pack exists and is indexed.

donorReport.notes: Evidence-backed donor report and maps exist.

importMapping.notes: Mystery Garden importer manifest and mapping path exist.

internalReplay.notes: Validated internal replay slice exists in project_001, now with a bounded editable shell workflow that can create preset placeholders, resize, move, align to the viewport, edit, reorder within a layer, read order position, step to previous/next siblings inside the current layer, isolate a single layer for focused edits, duplicate, delete, save, reload, and sync.

targetConcept.notes: A resulting game concept exists only as a future path.

targetBuild.notes: No resulting game build is started yet.

integration.notes: Production adapter work is not started yet.

qa.notes: Workspace and replay verification exist; broader QA remains future work.

releasePrep.notes: Release preparation is not started yet.

donor.notes: Only validated donor slice in the current workspace.

provenNotes: Internal replay runs from clean project data only.
The donor-to-replay path is verified without production integration.
plannedNotes: Additional donor slices may be added later.
targetGame.notes: Validated internal slice only; not the final resulting game.

provenFacts: Replay loader uses internal project data only.
Project_001 is the only validated donor-backed project so far.

The shell can now create preset placeholders, resize, align, edit, move, reorder within a layer, show layer-local order position, step previous/next within the current layer, isolate a focused layer view, duplicate, delete, and persist bounded scene objects from project_001 internal scene files.
Save deterministically syncs the replay-facing generated project.json output from the editable internal scene files, including placeholder size, ordering, and layer-local navigation-compatible edits.
plannedWork: Keep donor links and target game metadata explicit for every project.
Maintain the standard folder-based project lifecycle alongside the validated replay slice.
Expand the editor slice carefully without jumping into a full drag/drop editor.
assumptions: This metadata file is the shell-facing project summary until a richer workspace state file exists.
The current bounded editor slice remains intentionally small enough to stay reliable without advanced gizmos, resize handles, or a full asset-creation workflow yet.
unresolvedQuestions: How quickly the project registry will grow beyond a single validated entry.
Which next productivity upgrade should come after order cues and previous/next layer navigation are in place.
